ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* Unique ISBN of the book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the book is written */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the book */,
  "amount" REAL /* Price of the book */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL link to the book's thumbnail image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_authors" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Fiction, Non-Fiction) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for nested categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_categories" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book available in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount received from the sale */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, inventory manager, customer service) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Number of pages in the book
Language in which the book is written
A brief summary of the book
URL link to the book's thumbnail image
Date of birth of the author
Name of the category (e.g., Fiction, Non-Fiction)
ID of the parent category (for nested categories)
Unique identifier for each inventory record
Quantity of the book available in stock
Timestamp of the last update to the inventory
Unique identifier for each sale transaction
Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal)
ID of the customer who made the purchase
ID of the book being reviewed
ID of the customer who wrote the review
Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars)
Role of the user (e.g., admin, inventory manager, customer service)
